title: Do the English speak English?
question: 把今天课文里“到了真实公共场所，听不懂也要礼貌修复沟通”的线索放进车站、机场或酒店前台场景——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景各填一个空、用 word bank 里的词或短语。
example_answer: Excuse me. I don't know the way to my hotel. Could you say that again, please? I am a foreigner. Could you speak more slowly, please? Thank you.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 刚到酒店：我不知道去酒店的路
options.english_template: Excuse me. I don't know the ___ to my hotel.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 车站服务台：对方说得太快，我请他再说一遍

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 机场问路：我解释自己是外国人，请对方说慢一点
options.english_template: I am a foreigner. Could you ___, please?
